LEFT JOIN "SOCDetails" AS "s0" ON "r"."RequestId" = "s0"."RequestId"

LEFT JOIN "SysAdminDetails" AS "s" ON "r"."RequestId" = "s"."RequestId"
LEFT JOIN "DataCenterDetails" AS "d" ON "r"."RequestId" = "d"."RequestId"
LEFT JOIN "NOCDetails" AS "n" ON "r"."RequestId" = "n"."RequestId"
LEFT JOIN "SOCDetails" AS "s0" ON "r"."RequestId" = "s0"."RequestId"
LEFT JOIN "ServiceEntry" AS "s1" ON "s"."SysAdminDetailsId" = "s1"."SysAdminDetailsId"
LEFT JOIN "NetworkPathEntries" AS "n0" ON "n"."NOCDetailsId" = "n0"."NOCDetailsId"
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT "f"."FirewallEntryId", "f"."Action", "f"."DestinationIP", "f"."DestinationInterface", "f"."PolicyName", "f"."SOCDetailsId", "f"."Schedule", "f"."SourceIP", "f"."SourceInterface", "f"."VDOM", "f0"."FirewallServiceEntryId", "f0"."FirewallEntryId" AS "FirewallEntryId0", "f0"."Port", "f0"."Protocol", "f0"."ServiceName", "t"."FirewallEntryId" AS "FirewallEntryId1", "t"."SecurityProfileId", "t"."SecurityProfileId0", "t"."CreatedAt", "t"."CreatedBy", "t"."Name"
    FROM "FirewallEntries" AS "f"
    LEFT JOIN "FirewallServiceEntries" AS "f0" ON "f"."FirewallEntryId" = "f0"."FirewallEntryId"
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT "f1"."FirewallEntryId", "f1"."SecurityProfileId", "s2"."SecurityProfileId" AS "SecurityProfileId0", "s2"."CreatedAt", "s2"."CreatedBy", "s2"."Name"
        FROM "FirewallEntrySecurityProfiles" AS "f1"
        INNER JOIN "SecurityProfiles" AS "s2" ON "f1"."SecurityProfileId" = "s2"."SecurityProfileId"
    ) AS "t" ON "f"."FirewallEntryId" = "t"."FirewallEntryId"
) AS "t0" ON "s0"."SOCDetailsId" = "t0"."SOCDetailsId"
LEFT JOIN "StatusHistories" AS "s3" ON "r"."RequestId" = "s3"."RequestId"
ORDER BY "r"."CreatedAt" DESC, "r"."RequestId", "s"."SysAdminDetailsId", "d"."DataCenterDetailsId", "n"."NOCDetailsId", "s0"."SOCDetailsId", "s1"."ServiceEntryId", "n0"."NetworkPathEntryId", "t0"."FirewallEntryId", "t0"."FirewallServiceEntryId", "t0"."FirewallEntryId1", "t0"."SecurityProfileId", "t0"."SecurityProfileId0"

    FROM "Requests" AS "r"
    LEFT JOIN "SysAdminDetails" AS "s" ON "r"."RequestId" = "s"."RequestId"
    LEFT JOIN "DataCenterDetails" AS "d" ON "r"."RequestId" = "d"."RequestId"
    LEFT JOIN "NOCDetails" AS "n" ON "r"."RequestId" = "n"."RequestId"
    LEFT JOIN "SOCDetails" AS "s0" ON "r"."RequestId" = "s0"."RequestId"
    WHERE "r"."RequestId" = @__requestId_0
    LIMIT 1
) AS "t"
LEFT JOIN "ServiceEntry" AS "s1" ON "t"."SysAdminDetailsId" = "s1"."SysAdminDetailsId"

) AS "t0" ON "t"."SOCDetailsId" = "t0"."SOCDetailsId"

"t"."RequestId3", "t"."SubmittedAt2", "t"."SubmittedBy2", "t0"."FirewallEntryId", "t0"."Action", "t0"."DestinationIP", "t0"."DestinationInterface", "t0"."PolicyName", "t0"."SOCDetailsId", "t0"."Schedule", "t0"."SourceIP", "t0"."SourceInterface", "t0"."VDOM", "t0"."FirewallServiceEntryId", "t0"."FirewallEntryId0", "t0"."Port", "t0"."Protocol", "t0"."ServiceName", FROM (
    SELECT "r"."RequestId", "r"."AccessGroup", "r"."ApplicationName", "r"."AuthenticationMethod", "r"."CisoApprovedAt", "r"."CisoApprovedBy", "r"."CisoComments", "r"."CisoDecision", "r"."CreatedAt", "r"."CreatedBy", "r"."CtoApprovedAt", "r"."CtoApprovedBy", "r"."CtoComments", "r"."CtoDecision", "r"."DBMS", "r"."Environment", "r"."ExpectedUsers", "r"."ExternalSyncStatus", "r"."FQDNSuggestion", "r"."FortiGatePolicyId", "r"."Framework", "r"."GitRepoLink", "r"."IocComments", "r"."NetBoxId", "r"."ObjectSlug", "r"."OpsApprovedAt", "r"."OpsApprovedBy", "r"."OpsComments", "r"."OpsDecision", "r"."ProgrammingLanguage", "r"."Purpose", "r"."SLA", "r"."Status", "r"."UpdatedAt", "s"."SysAdminDetailsId", "s"."DatabaseName", "s"."DatabaseUsername", "s"."Hostname", "s"."RequestId" AS "RequestId0", "s"."SensitivityLevel", "s"."ServerResources", "s"."SubmittedAt", "s"."SubmittedBy", "s"."WebServer", "d"."DataCenterDetailsId", "d"."BareMetalType", "d"."Cluster", "d"."DC", "d"."Environment" AS "Environment0", "d"."PortNumber", "d"."RackNumber", "d"."RackRoom", "d"."RequestId" AS "RequestId1", "d"."SubmittedAt" AS "SubmittedAt0", "d"."SubmittedBy" AS "SubmittedBy0", "d"."UplinkSpeed", "n"."NOCDetailsId", "n"."FQDN", "n"."Gateway", "n"."IPAddress", "n"."Port", "n"."RequestId" AS "RequestId2", "n"."SubmittedAt" AS "SubmittedAt1", "n"."SubmittedBy" AS "SubmittedBy1", "n"."SubnetMask", "n"."VIP", "n"."VLANID", "n"."VirtualFQDN", "n"."VirtualIP", "n"."VirtualPort", "s0"."SOCDetailsId", "s0"."RequestId" AS "RequestId3", "s0"."SubmittedAt" AS "SubmittedAt2", "s0"."SubmittedBy" AS "SubmittedBy2"
    FROM "Requests" AS "r"
    LEFT JOIN "SysAdminDetails" AS "s" ON "r"."RequestId" = "s"."RequestId"
    LEFT JOIN "DataCenterDetails" AS "d" ON "r"."RequestId" = "d"."RequestId"
    LEFT JOIN "NOCDetails" AS "n" ON "r"."RequestId" = "n"."RequestId"
    LEFT JOIN "SOCDetails" AS "s0" ON "r"."RequestId" = "s0"."RequestId"
    WHERE "r"."RequestId" = @__requestId_0
    LIMIT 1
) AS "t"
LEFT JOIN "ServiceEntry" AS "s1" ON "t"."SysAdminDetailsId" = "s1"."SysAdminDetailsId"
LEFT JOIN "NetworkPathEntries" AS "n0" ON "t"."NOCDetailsId" = "n0"."NOCDetailsId"
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT "f"."FirewallEntryId", "f"."Action", "f"."DestinationIP", "f"."DestinationInterface", "f"."PolicyName", "f"."SOCDetailsId", "f"."Schedule", "f"."SourceIP", "f"."SourceInterface", "f"."VDOM", "f0"."FirewallServiceEntryId", "f0"."FirewallEntryId" AS "FirewallEntryId0", "f0"."Port", "f0"."Protocol", "f0"."ServiceName", "t1"."FirewallEntryId" AS "FirewallEntryId1", "t1"."SecurityProfileId", "t1"."SecurityProfileId0", "t1"."CreatedAt", "t1"."CreatedBy", "t1"."Name"
    FROM "FirewallEntries" AS "f"
    LEFT JOIN "FirewallServiceEntries" AS "f0" ON "f"."FirewallEntryId" = "f0"."FirewallEntryId"
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT "f1"."FirewallEntryId", "f1"."SecurityProfileId", "s2"."SecurityProfileId" AS "SecurityProfileId0", "s2"."CreatedAt", "s2"."CreatedBy", "s2"."Name"
        FROM "FirewallEntrySecurityProfiles" AS "f1"
        INNER JOIN "SecurityProfiles" AS "s2" ON "f1"."SecurityProfileId" = "s2"."SecurityProfileId"
    ) AS "t1" ON "f"."FirewallEntryId" = "t1"."FirewallEntryId"
) AS "t0" ON "t"."SOCDetailsId" = "t0"."SOCDetailsId"
LEFT JOIN "StatusHistories" AS "s3" ON "t"."RequestId" = "s3"."RequestId"
ORDER BY "t"."RequestId", "t"."SysAdminDetailsId", "t"."DataCenterDetailsId", "t"."NOCDetailsId", "t"."SOCDetailsId", "s1"."ServiceEntryId", "n0"."NetworkPathEntryId", "t0"."FirewallEntryId", "t0"."FirewallServiceEntryId", "t0"."FirewallEntryId1", "t0"."SecurityProfileId", "t0"."SecurityProfileId0"
